title: Money Balloon Surprise, Money Balloon, Birthday Money Box Cash Gift Pull, Surprise Gift Box, Birthday Surprise Gifts for Women Men Mother Girlfriend Wife（Black）
features: 【Packaging Conten】You will receive 1 set of money balloon surprise, including 2 Happy Birthday balloons, 1 roll of ribbon, 1 paper box, 2 pieces of wrapping paper, 36 clear money bags, and 2 metal twisted ropes. The complete set of equipment will meet your needs for preparing surprises.

【High Quality Materials】The balloons in our money balloon are made of latex, thick and durable, not easily torn, and can be filled with helium gas to keep them floating in the air. You don't have to worry about the surprise failing before it arrives due to the deflated balloon.

【Surprise Gift】The birthday money box cash gift pull is a very complete and special gift. You can put some cash into a transparent money bag and hang it up with a balloon. Release the balloon when you surprise her, and the balloon will float up and pull the cash in the box. The visual impact is very strong, and this gift will impress your girlfriend or wife who likes surprises.

【Easy to assemble】First assemble the gift box, then put the tissue paper inside, put the money in a plastic bag, glue the bag together, attach them to the balloons with the metal cable tie, then place them in the box, finally put the ribbon through the bottom of the box and tie it securely with a knot around the top of the balloon.

【Wide Applications】Money gift box meets the needs of various occasions! The birthday money gift box is suitable for various birthday celebration activities, whether it is a gathering of family and friends or a family gathering, it is the perfect choice for birthday gifts.
